slots.panel_1: Pricing the house at the comp
slots.panel_2: Pricing $25K above because we put new pulls on the cabinets
slots.panel_3: Pricing $80K above because Zestimate showed it that high once in 2022
slots.panel_4: Pricing $1.2M and refusing weekend showings because we are not desperate

caption_draft.ig: Spent four hours on the CMA. They looked at it for nine seconds and said 'but our neighbor sold theirs for more.'

calibration_notes: Escalation goes from reasonable (panel 1) to clinically delusional (panel 4). Each step is a real thing every agent has heard verbatim. 'New pulls' is the kind of laughably small justification sellers cite. The $1.2M panel + 'we are not desperate' is the kill shot. Caption hits the agent's CMA-vs-9-seconds wound — pure self-deprecation.
